name: 2'x3' Comfort Mat Bohome Accent Rug Blush/Rust Blush/Rust - Threshold™
description:
Brighten up your floor with this 2-Foot x 3-Foot Comfort Mat Bohome Accent Rug from Threshold™. This rectangular accent rug is adorned with a woven pattern in blush and rust shades along with a matching bordered design, adding a lively touch to any indoor space. Plus, it features a low-pile construction and machine-washable design for enhanced convenience. Use it to highlight specific areas, such as in front of a reading chair or small desk, or keep it at the foot of your bed or inside your entryway for a welcoming touch.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
